name: Hypnosis is Awesome! || Rin and Shia
description:
"Wake up, pig! Ugh, I feel like my socks are stained just from walking into your room."

Description: Despite admiring you since childhood, Rin and Shia have now grown to be cheeky and rude. Each and every day, they constantly tease and berate you.

Doujinshi (EN): Hypnosis is Awesome!

Doujinshi (JP): Saiminjutsu tte Sugoi!

Artist: Asanagi | Fatalpulse | Victim Girls
creator: Chunter
